ddls:
CREATE TABLE "modalities" (
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modality */,
  "modality_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnostic modality */,
  "first_peer_reviewed" TEXT /* Year the modality first appeared in peer-reviewed literature */,
  "fda_approval" TEXT /* Year the modality received FDA approval/clearance */,
  "cms_coverage" TEXT /* Year the modality received CMS coverage decision for breast cancer */,
  "nccn_guideline_inclusion" TEXT /* Year the modality was included in NCCN guidelines */,
  "modality_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the modality */,
  "modality_type" TEXT /* Type of modality (e.g., imaging, laboratory test) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Company that manufactures the modality */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the modality was first developed */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Average cost of the modality */,
  "sensitivity" TEXT /* Sensitivity of the modality */,
  "specificity" TEXT /* Specificity of the modality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peer_reviewed" (
  "peer_reviewed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peer-reviewed appearance */,
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic modality */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of peer-reviewed appearance */,
  "publication" TEXT /* Publication details */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the article */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peer_reviewed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peer_reviewed_modality_id FOREIGN KEY ("modality_id") REFERENCES modalities ("modality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fda_regulatory" (
  "fda_regulatory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FDA regulatory event */,
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic modality */,
  "approval_year" TEXT /* Year of FDA approval/clearance */,
  "approval_type" TEXT /* Type of FDA approval/clearance */,
  "approval_number" TEXT /* FDA approval number */,
  "approval_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the FDA approval process and any conditions */,
  "indication" TEXT /* Specific indication for which the modality is approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fda_regulatory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fda_regulatory_modality_id FOREIGN KEY ("modality_id") REFERENCES modalities ("modality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cms_coverage" (
  "cms_coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CMS coverage decision */,
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic modality */,
  "decision_year" TEXT /* Year of CMS coverage decision */,
  "coverage_level" TEXT /* Level of CMS coverage */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the CMS coverage decision */,
  "coverage_conditions" TEXT /* Any conditions or limitations on the coverage */,
  "coverage_status" TEXT /* Current status of the coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cms_coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cms_coverage_modality_id FOREIGN KEY ("modality_id") REFERENCES modalities ("modality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nccn_guidelines" (
  "nccn_guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NCCN guideline inclusion */,
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic modality */,
  "inclusion_year" TEXT /* Year of inclusion in NCCN guidelines */,
  "guideline_version" TEXT /* Version of the NCCN guidelines */,
  "guideline_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the guidelines related to the modality */,
  "guideline_link" TEXT /* Link to the full NCCN guidelines document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nccn_guideline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nccn_guidelines_modality_id FOREIGN KEY ("modality_id") REFERENCES modalities ("modality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., physician, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or unit the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* User's access level (e.g., basic, advanced, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic modality being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the modality */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the modality was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_modality_id FOREIGN KEY ("modality_id") REFERENCES modalities ("modality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytical insight */,
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic modality */,
  "insight" TEXT /* Insight or analysis related to the modality */,
  "insight_date" TEXT /* Date the insight was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the insight */,
  "insight_source" TEXT /* Source of the insight (e.g., peer-reviewed article, internal analysis) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the insight (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of the impact of the insight on patient care or policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_modality_id FOREIGN KEY ("modality_id") REFERENCES modalities ("modality_id")
)
